duas.title: Dua for Knowledge
duas.arabic: رَبِّ زِدْنِي عِلْمًا
duas.translation: My Lord, increase me in knowledge.
duas.benefits: Direct Quranic command to seek more knowledge

duas.title: Dua for Ease in Difficulty
duas.arabic: رَبِّ اشْرَحْ لِي صَدْرِي وَيَسِّرْ لِي أَمْرِي وَاحْلُلْ عُقْدَةً مِنْ لِسَانِي يَفْقَهُوا قَوْلِي
duas.translation: My Lord, expand my chest, ease my task, and untie the knot from my tongue so they may understand my speech.
duas.benefits: Dua of Musa (AS) for ease and clarity

duas.title: Dua for Understanding and Memory
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ انْفَعْنِي بِمَا عَلَّمْتَنِي وَعَلِّمْنِي مَا يَنْفَعُنِي وَزِدْنِي عِلْمًا
duas.translation: O Allah, benefit me with what You have taught me, teach me what benefits me, and increase me in knowledge.
duas.benefits: Comprehensive dua for beneficial knowledge

duas.title: Dua for Concentration
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ فَهْمَ النَّبِيِّينَ وَحِفْظَ الْمُرْسَلِينَ
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for the understanding of the prophets and the memory of the messengers.
duas.benefits: Aids concentration and memory retention

duas.title: Dua for Wisdom
duas.arabic: رَبِّ هَبْ لِي حُكْمًا وَأَلْحِقْنِي بِالصَّالِحِينَ
duas.translation: My Lord, grant me wisdom and join me with the righteous.
duas.benefits: Dua of Ibrahim (AS) for wisdom and righteousness

duas.title: Dua for Success in Studies
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا مِنْ لَدُنْكَ رَحْمَةً وَهَيِّئْ لَنَا مِنْ أَمْرِنَا رَشَدًا
duas.translation: Our Lord, grant us from Yourself mercy and prepare for us right guidance.
duas.benefits: Dua of the People of the Cave seeking guidance

duas.title: Dua for Retaining Knowledge
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْتَوْدِعُكَ مَا عَلَّمْتَنِي فَارْدُدْهُ إِلَيَّ عِنْدَ حَاجَتِي إِلَيْهِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I entrust You with what You have taught me, so return it to me when I need it.
duas.benefits: Trusts knowledge to Allah for recall when needed

duas.title: Dua for Clear Speech
duas.arabic: رَبِّ اشْرَحْ لِي صَدْرِي وَيَسِّرْ لِي أَمْرِي
duas.translation: My Lord, expand my chest and ease my task.
duas.benefits: Shortened version of Musa dua for ease

duas.title: Dua Before Entering an Exam
duas.arabic: رَبِّ أَدْخِلْنِي مُدْخَلَ صِدْقٍ وَأَخْرِجْنِي مُخْرَجَ صِدْقٍ وَاجْعَلْ لِي مِنْ لَدُنْكَ سُلْطَانًا نَصِيرًا
duas.translation: My Lord, cause me to enter a sound entrance and exit, and grant me supporting authority.
duas.benefits: Dua for success in all entrances and exits

duas.title: Dua for Gratitude After Learning
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي بِنِعْمَتِهِ تَتِمُّ الصَّالِحَاتُ
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah by whose favor good deeds are completed.
duas.benefits: Gratitude after completing a study session
duas.timing: After completing any study or exam

duas.title: Dua for a Righteous Spouse
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوَاجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّاتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ وَاجْعَلْنَا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا
duas.translation: Our Lord, grant us from our spouses and offspring comfort to our eyes and make us an example for the righteous.
duas.benefits: Dua for a righteous family and spouse

duas.title: Dua for Love Between Spouses
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوَاجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّاتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ
duas.translation: Our Lord, grant us from our spouses and offspring comfort to our eyes.
duas.benefits: Strengthens love and affection between spouses

duas.title: Dua for Newly Married Couple
duas.arabic: بَارَكَ اللَّهُ لَكَ وَبَارَكَ عَلَيْكَ وَجَمَعَ بَيْنَكُمَا فِي خَيْرٍ
duas.translation: May Allah bless you, send blessings upon you, and join you together in goodness.
duas.benefits: The Prophet would say this for newly married couples
duas.timing: When congratulating a newly married couple

duas.title: Dua for the Wedding Night
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لِي فِي أَهْلِي وَبَارِكْ لَهُمْ فِيَّ
duas.translation: O Allah, bless me in my family and bless them in me.
duas.benefits: Blessing and protection for the marriage

duas.title: Dua for Righteous Offspring
duas.arabic: رَبِّ هَبْ لِي مِنْ لَدُنْكَ ذُرِّيَّةً طَيِّبَةً إِنَّكَ سَمِيعُ الدُّعَاءِ
duas.translation: My Lord, grant me from Yourself good offspring. You are the Hearer of supplication.
duas.benefits: Dua of Zakariya (AS) for righteous children

duas.title: Dua for Marital Harmony
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا اجْعَلْنَا مُسْلِمَيْنِ لَكَ وَمِنْ ذُرِّيَّتِنَا أُمَّةً مُسْلِمَةً لَكَ
duas.translation: Our Lord, make us both submissive to You and from our descendants a nation submissive to You.
duas.benefits: Dua of Ibrahim (AS) for family faith unity

duas.title: Dua for Protection of Family
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ احْفَظْ أَهْلِي وَأَوْلَادِي مِنْ كُلِّ سُوءٍ
duas.translation: O Allah, protect my family and children from all evil.
duas.benefits: Protection for the entire family

duas.title: Dua for Spouses Good Character
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَلِّفْ بَيْنَ قُلُوبِنَا وَأَصْلِحْ ذَاتَ بَيْنِنَا وَاهْدِنَا سُبُلَ السَّلَامِ
duas.translation: O Allah, unite our hearts, reconcile us, and guide us to the paths of peace.
duas.benefits: Promotes unity and harmony in the family
duas.timing: Daily, especially when there is tension

duas.title: Dua for Entering a New Home
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَ هَذِهِ الدَّارِ وَخَيْرَ أَهْلِهَا
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for the good of this home and its people.
duas.benefits: Blesses the new home and protects the family
duas.timing: When moving into a new home

duas.title: Dua for Barakah in Marriage
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِي أَهْلِنَا وَأَمْوَالِنَا
duas.translation: O Allah, bless us in our family and our wealth.
duas.benefits: Seeks blessing in family and provision

duas.title: Sayyidul Istighfar
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ وَأَنَا عَلَى عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ أَبُوءُ لَكَ بِنِعْمَتِكَ عَلَيَّ وَأَبُوءُ لَكَ بِذَنْبِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
duas.translation: O Allah, You are my Lord. There is no god but You. You created me and I am Your slave. I confess my sins. Forgive me, for none forgives sins but You.
duas.benefits: Whoever recites this with firm belief in the morning and dies that day enters Paradise

duas.title: Simple Istighfar
duas.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللهَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
duas.translation: I seek forgiveness from Allah and I repent to Him.
duas.benefits: The Prophet would say this 100 times a day

duas.title: Dua for Complete Forgiveness
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا اغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا وَإِسْرَافَنَا فِي أَمْرِنَا وَثَبِّتْ أَقْدَامَنَا وَانْصُرْنَا عَلَى الْقَوْمِ الْكَافِرِينَ
duas.translation: Our Lord, forgive us our sins and transgressions, make our feet firm, and give us victory.
duas.benefits: Comprehensive dua for forgiveness and steadfastness

duas.title: Dua of Adam (AS)
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا ظَلَمْنَا أَنْفُسَنَا وَإِنْ لَمْ تَغْفِرْ لَنَا وَتَرْحَمْنَا لَنَكُونَنَّ مِنَ الْخَاسِرِينَ
duas.translation: Our Lord, we have wronged ourselves. If You do not forgive us, we will be among the losers.
duas.benefits: Allah accepted Adam's repentance after this dua

duas.title: Dua for Expiation of All Sins
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي ذَنْبِي كُلَّهُ دِقَّهُ وَجِلَّهُ وَأَوَّلَهُ وَآخِرَهُ وَعَلَانِيَتَهُ وَسِرَّهُ
duas.translation: O Allah, forgive me all my sins, the small and great, first and last, public and private.
duas.benefits: Covers all types of sins

duas.title: Dua for Forgiveness and Mercy
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا آمَنَّا فَاغْفِرْ لَنَا وَارْحَمْنَا وَأَنْتَ خَيْرُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
duas.translation: Our Lord, we have believed, so forgive us and have mercy on us.
duas.benefits: Combines faith with seeking mercy

duas.title: Dua of Musa (AS)
duas.arabic: رَبِّ إِنِّي ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي
duas.translation: My Lord, I have wronged myself, so forgive me.
duas.benefits: Musa (AS) made this dua and Allah forgave him

duas.title: Dua for Believers Forgiveness
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا اغْفِرْ لَنَا وَلِإِخْوَانِنَا الَّذِينَ سَبَقُونَا بِالْإِيمَانِ
duas.translation: Our Lord, forgive us and our brothers who preceded us in faith.
duas.benefits: Connects personal forgiveness with community

duas.title: Dua of Yunus (AS)
duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
duas.translation: There is no god but You, glory be to You. I have been among the wrongdoers.
duas.benefits: Allah saved Yunus (AS) from darkness

duas.title: Dua to Avoid Persisting in Sin
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي مَا قَدَّمْتُ وَمَا أَخَّرْتُ وَمَا أَسْرَرْتُ وَمَا أَعْلَنْتُ
duas.translation: O Allah, forgive me what I have done before and after, what I have hidden and done openly.
duas.benefits: Covers past and future sins

duas.title: Dua of Yunus (AS) in Distress
duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
duas.translation: There is no god but You, glory be to You. I have been among the wrongdoers.
duas.benefits: The Prophet said this dua relieves any distress

duas.title: Dua for Removing Anxiety and Sorrow
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي عَبْدُكَ ابْنُ عَبْدِكَ ابْنُ أَمَتِكَ نَاصِيَتِي بِيَدِكَ مَاضٍ فِيَّ حُكْمُكَ عَدْلٌ فِيَّ قَضَاؤُكَ
duas.translation: O Allah, I am Your servant. My forelock is in Your hand. Your decree over me is just.
duas.benefits: The Prophet taught this for removing deep sorrow

duas.title: Dua for Sufficiency
duas.arabic: حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
duas.translation: Allah is sufficient for me. There is no god but Him. In Him I put my trust.
duas.benefits: Whoever says it 7 times morning, Allah suffices them

duas.title: Dua for Relief from Distress
duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ الْعَظِيمُ الْحَلِيمُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
duas.translation: There is no god but Allah, the Mighty, the Forbearing, Lord of the Mighty Throne.
duas.benefits: The Prophet said this when in distress

duas.title: Dua for Ease After Hardship
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَا سَهْلَ إِلَّا مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلًا وَأَنْتَ تَجْعَلُ الْحَزْنَ إِذَا شِئْتَ سَهْلًا
duas.translation: O Allah, there is no ease except what You make easy.
duas.benefits: Transforms hardship into ease

duas.title: Dua of Yaqub (AS) in Patience
duas.arabic: إِنَّمَا أَشْكُو بَثِّي وَحُزْنِي إِلَى اللَّهِ
duas.translation: I only complain of my suffering and grief to Allah.
duas.benefits: Teaches turning only to Allah with grief

duas.title: Dua for Contentment
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَضِّنِي بِقَضَائِكَ وَبَارِكْ لِي فِيمَا قُدِّرَ لِي
duas.translation: O Allah, make me content with Your decree and bless me in what is destined.
duas.benefits: Brings peace and acceptance of Allah decree
duas.timing: When struggling to accept what happened

duas.title: Dua for Strength in Grief
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ وَالْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from anxiety, sorrow, weakness, and laziness.
duas.benefits: Comprehensive refuge from distress

duas.title: Dua for Patience
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا أَفْرِغْ عَلَيْنَا صَبْرًا وَثَبِّتْ أَقْدَامَنَا
duas.translation: Our Lord, pour upon us patience and make our feet firm.
duas.benefits: Seeks patience and steadfastness in hardship

duas.title: Dua for Tomorrow Worries
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلَالِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ
duas.translation: O Allah, suffice me with lawful over unlawful, enrich me by Your bounty.
duas.benefits: Relieves worry about provision and future

duas.title: Dua for Anxiety Relief
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from anxiety and sorrow.
duas.benefits: Direct protection from anxiety as taught by the Prophet

duas.title: Dua for Peace of Heart
duas.arabic: الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَتَطْمَئِنُّ قُلُوبُهُم بِذِكْرِ اللَّهِ أَلَا بِذِكْرِ اللَّهِ تَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ
duas.translation: Those who believe and find peace in remembrance of Allah. In His remembrance do hearts find peace.
duas.benefits: Remembrance of Allah brings genuine peace

duas.title: Dua for Trust in Allah
duas.arabic: حَسْبُنَا اللَّهُ وَنِعْمَ الْوَكِيلُ
duas.translation: Allah is sufficient for us and the best Disposer of affairs.
duas.benefits: The believers said this and were rewarded with peace

duas.title: Dua for Calmness
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْزِلْ فِي قَلْبِي سَكِينَةً
duas.translation: O Allah, send down tranquility into my heart.
duas.benefits: Seeks inner peace and calm

duas.title: Dua from the Quran for Stress
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا عَلَيْكَ تَوَكَّلْنَا وَإِلَيْكَ أَنَبْنَا وَإِلَيْكَ الْمَصِيرُ
duas.translation: Our Lord, upon You we rely, to You we return, to You is the destination.
duas.benefits: Full surrender to Allah relieves stress

duas.title: Dua for Protection from Worries
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for well-being in this world and the Hereafter.
duas.benefits: Comprehensive protection from all harm

duas.title: Dua for Light in the Heart
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ فِي قَلْبِي نُورًا وَفِي لِسَانِي نُورًا
duas.translation: O Allah, place light in my heart and light in my tongue.
duas.benefits: Dispels darkness of worry with spiritual light

duas.title: Dua for Ease in All Matters
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ يَسِّرْ وَلَا تُعَسِّرْ وَتَمِّمْ بِالْخَيْرِ
duas.translation: O Allah, make things easy, not difficult, complete them with goodness.
duas.benefits: Seeks ease and good outcomes
duas.timing: At the start of any task

duas.title: Dua for Relief from Panic
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَا تُؤَاخِذْنَا إِنْ نَسِينَا أَوْ أَخْطَأْنَا
duas.translation: Our Lord, do not blame us if we forget or make a mistake.
duas.benefits: Allah said I have done so when this was revealed

duas.title: Dua for Inner Peace
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَلِّفْ بَيْنَ قُلُوبِنَا وَأَصْلِحْ ذَاتَ بَيْنِنَا وَاهْدِنَا سُبُلَ السَّلَامِ
duas.translation: O Allah, unite our hearts, reconcile us, guide us to peace.
duas.benefits: Comprehensive dua for peace and unity

duas.title: Dua for Sufficient Provision
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلَالِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ
duas.translation: O Allah, suffice me with lawful over unlawful, enrich me by Your bounty.
duas.benefits: Seeks halal rizq and independence from others

duas.title: Dua for Barakah in Wealth
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِي رِزْقِنَا وَبَارِكْ لَنَا فِي أَهْلِنَا
duas.translation: O Allah, bless us in our provision and our family.
duas.benefits: Brings blessing to existing wealth

duas.title: Dua of Musa (AS) for Provision
duas.arabic: رَبِّ إِنِّي لِمَا أَنْزَلْتَ إِلَيَّ مِنْ خَيْرٍ فَقِيرٌ
duas.translation: My Lord, I am in need of whatever good You send me.
duas.benefits: Musa (AS) made this dua and Allah provided
duas.timing: When seeking provision or a job

duas.title: Dua for Entering the Market
duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ يُحْيِي وَيُمِيتُ وَهُوَ حَيٌّ لَا يَمُوتُ بِيَدِهِ الْخَيْرُ
duas.translation: There is no god but Allah alone, no partner. His is the kingdom, all praise, in His hand is all good.
duas.benefits: Whoever says this in the market gets a million good deeds

duas.title: Dua for Protection from Poverty
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْفَقْرِ وَالْقِلَّةِ وَالذِّلَّةِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from poverty, scarcity, and humiliation.
duas.benefits: Protection from financial hardship

duas.title: Dua for Halal Earning
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ارْزُقْنِي رِزْقًا حَلَالًا طَيِّبًا
duas.translation: O Allah, grant me pure and lawful provision.
duas.benefits: Seeks halal rizq

duas.title: Dua for Beneficial Rain
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَيِّبًا نَافِعًا
duas.translation: O Allah, send beneficial rain.
duas.benefits: The Prophet said this when rain came

duas.title: Dua for No Debt Burden
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ ضَلَعِ الدَّيْنِ وَغَلَبَةِ الرِّجَالِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge from burden of debt and oppression of people.
duas.benefits: Protection from debt weight

duas.title: Dua for Abundant Provision
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَغْنِنِي بِالْعِلْمِ وَزَيِّنِّي بِالْحِلْمِ وَأَكْرِمْنِي بِالتَّقْوَى
duas.translation: O Allah, enrich me with knowledge, adorn me with forbearance, honor me with piety.
duas.benefits: Seeks true richness in knowledge and faith

duas.title: Dua for Contentment
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَضِّنِي بِمَا قَسَمْتَ لِي حَتَّى لَا أَسْأَلَ أَحَدًا غَيْرَكَ
duas.translation: O Allah, make me content with what You allotted me.
duas.benefits: Fosters reliance on Allah alone

duas.title: Dua for Well-being
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for well-being in this world and the Hereafter.
duas.benefits: Comprehensive dua for health in both worlds

duas.title: Dua for Protection from Diseases
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْبَرَصِ وَالْجُنُونِ وَالْجُذَامِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge from leprosy, madness, and other evil diseases.
duas.benefits: Protection from serious diseases

duas.title: Dua of Ayyub (AS) for Healing
duas.arabic: أَنِّي مَسَّنِيَ الضُّرُّ وَأَنْتَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
duas.translation: Indeed, adversity has touched me, and You are the Most Merciful.
duas.benefits: Allah restored Ayyub health completely

duas.title: Dua for Physical Health
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَدَنِي اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي سَمْعِي اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَصَرِي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
duas.translation: O Allah, grant health to my body, hearing, and sight.
duas.benefits: Covers overall physical health including senses

duas.title: Dua for Visiting the Sick
duas.arabic: لَا بَأْسَ طَهُورٌ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ
duas.translation: No worry, it will be a purification, Allah willing.
duas.benefits: The Prophet would say this when visiting the sick

duas.title: Dua for When Feeling Pain
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
duas.translation: In the name of Allah.
duas.benefits: Place hand on pain and say Bismillah thrice

duas.title: Dua for Shifa (Healing)
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ النَّاسِ أَذْهِبِ الْبَاسَ وَاشْفِهِ وَأَنْتَ الشَّافِي لَا شِفَاءَ إِلَّا شِفَاؤُكَ شِفَاءً لَا يُغَادِرُ سَقَمًا
duas.translation: O Allah, Lord of mankind, remove the harm and heal him. There is no healing but Your healing.
duas.benefits: Powerful healing dua taught by the Prophet
duas.timing: When sick or for a sick person

duas.title: Dua for Protection from Harm
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اسْتُرْ عَوْرَاتِي وَآمِنْ رَوْعَاتِي
duas.translation: O Allah, cover my faults and calm my fears.
duas.benefits: Seeks protection and peace of mind

duas.title: Dua for Relaxation
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ نَفِّسْ عَنِّي كَرْبِي وَهَمِّي وَاجْعَلْ لِي مِنْ أَمْرِي فَرَجًا
duas.translation: O Allah, relieve my distress and grant me a way out.
duas.benefits: Relief from physical and mental stress

duas.title: Dua for Protection from Calamity
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ زَوَالِ نِعْمَتِكَ وَتَحَوُّلِ عَافِيَتِكَ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge from removal of Your blessing and change of well-being.
duas.benefits: Protection from loss of health and blessings

duas.title: Dua for Success in Both Worlds
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
duas.translation: Our Lord, give us good in this world and the Hereafter, protect us from the Fire.
duas.benefits: The most comprehensive dua for success

duas.title: Dua for Steadfastness
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تُزِغْ قُلُوبَنَا بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنَا وَهَبْ لَنَا مِنْ لَدُنْكَ رَحْمَةً
duas.translation: Our Lord, do not let our hearts deviate after guidance, grant us mercy.
duas.benefits: Protects from deviation and grants mercy

duas.title: Dua for Guidance
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اهْدِنِي وَسَدِّدْنِي
duas.translation: O Allah, guide me and make me steadfast.
duas.benefits: Concise dua for guidance and correctness

duas.title: Dua for Good Outcomes
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَلْهِمْنِي رُشْدِي وَأَعِذْنِي مِنْ شَرِّ نَفْسِي
duas.translation: O Allah, inspire me with right guidance, protect me from my own self.
duas.benefits: Seeks divine inspiration for right decisions

duas.title: Dua for Starting Tasks
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَبِاللَّهِ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَتَوَكَّلُ عَلَيْكَ
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, and by Allah. O Allah, I put my trust in You.
duas.benefits: Combines Bismillah with tawakkul for success

duas.title: Dua for Victory
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تَجْعَلْنَا مَعَ الْقَوْمِ الظَّالِمِينَ
duas.translation: Our Lord, do not place us among the wrongdoing people.
duas.benefits: Seeks protection from wrongdoers

duas.title: Dua for Excellence
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَحْسِنْ عَاقِبَتَنَا فِي الْأُمُورِ كُلِّهَا
duas.translation: O Allah, make our end good in all matters.
duas.benefits: Seeks good endings in all affairs

duas.title: Dua of Ibrahim (AS) for Acceptance
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا تَقَبَّلْ مِنَّا إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
duas.translation: Our Lord, accept from us. You are the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.
duas.benefits: Dua of Ibrahim building the Kaaba

duas.title: Dua for Wisdom in Speech
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَيِّبْ قَوْلِي وَأَدِّبْ لِسَانِي وَاهْدِ قَلْبِي
duas.translation: O Allah, make my speech proper, discipline my tongue, guide my heart.
duas.benefits: Wisdom in speech and action

duas.title: Dua for Barakah in Efforts
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لِي فِي عَمَلِي وَوَفِّقْنِي لِمَا تُحِبُّ
duas.translation: O Allah, bless my work and grant me success in what You love.
duas.benefits: Seeks blessing and alignment with Allah pleasure

duas.title: Ayat-ul-Kursi
duas.arabic: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ
duas.translation: Allah, there is no god but Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer. Neither drowsiness nor sleep overtakes Him.
duas.benefits: Whoever recites it morning is protected until evening

duas.title: Al-Muawwidhat (Surahs of Refuge)
duas.arabic: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ... قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ...
duas.translation: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of the dawn... Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind...
duas.benefits: Best protection against magic and evil eye

duas.title: Dua for Evening Protection
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, with whose name nothing can harm on earth or heaven.
duas.benefits: Whoever says it 3 times, nothing harms them

duas.title: Dua for Protection from Evil Eye
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ عَلَيْهِ وَلَا تُصِبْهُ بِعَيْنٍ
duas.translation: O Allah, bless him and protect him from the evil eye.
duas.benefits: Protects from the harm of the evil eye

duas.title: Dua for Protection from Shaitan
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ
duas.translation: I seek refuge in Allah from the accursed Shaitan.
duas.benefits: Protects from whispers of Shaitan
duas.timing: When angry or having bad thoughts

duas.title: Dua for Leaving Home
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللَّهِ وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, I put my trust in Allah. No power except through Allah.
duas.benefits: Guided, protected, Shaitan stays away

duas.title: Dua for Entering Home
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَلَجْنَا وَبِسْمِ اللَّهِ خَرَجْنَا وَعَلَى اللَّهِ رَبِّنَا تَوَكَّلْنَا
duas.translation: In Allah name we enter, in His name we leave, upon Allah we rely.
duas.benefits: Protection for the home

duas.title: Dua for before Sleep
duas.arabic: بِاسْمِكَ اللَّهُمَّ أَمُوتُ وَأَحْيَا
duas.translation: In Your name, O Allah, I die and I live.
duas.benefits: The Prophet would say this before sleeping

duas.title: Dua from Calamities
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي عَافَانِي مِمَّا ابْتَلَى بِهِ غَيْرِي
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah who saved me from what He afflicted others with.
duas.benefits: Gratitude for safety from trials

duas.title: Dua for Protection from Hellfire
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا اصْرِفْ عَنَّا عَذَابَ جَهَنَّمَ إِنَّ عَذَابَهَا كَانَ غَرَامًا
duas.translation: Our Lord, avert from us the punishment of Hellfire.
duas.benefits: Quranic dua for protection from Hell

duas.title: Dua for Parents Mercy
duas.arabic: رَبِّ ارْحَمْهُمَا كَمَا رَبَّيَانِي صَغِيرًا
duas.translation: My Lord, have mercy on them as they raised me when I was small.
duas.benefits: Direct Quranic command to pray for parents

duas.title: Dua for Parents Forgiveness
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا اغْفِرْ لِي وَلِوَالِدَيَّ وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ يَوْمَ يَقُومُ الْحِسَابُ
duas.translation: Our Lord, forgive me, my parents, and the believers on Judgment Day.
duas.benefits: Dua of Ibrahim (AS) for parents

duas.title: Dua for Parents While Alive
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ احْفَظْ لِي وَالِدَيَّ وَأَطِلْ عُمُرَهُمَا عَلَى طَاعَتِكَ
duas.translation: O Allah, protect my parents and grant them long life in obedience.
duas.benefits: Protection and long life for parents

duas.title: Dua for Deceased Parents
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِوَالِدَيَّ وَارْحَمْهُمَا كَمَا رَبَّيَانِي صَغِيرًا
duas.translation: O Allah, forgive and have mercy on my parents as they raised me.
duas.benefits: Continues reward for parents after death

duas.title: Dua for Gratitude to Parents
duas.arabic: رَبِّ أَوْزِعْنِي أَنْ أَشْكُرَ نِعْمَتَكَ الَّتِي أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيَّ وَعَلَى وَالِدَيَّ
duas.translation: My Lord, inspire me to be grateful for Your favor on me and my parents.
duas.benefits: Dua of Sulayman (AS) for gratitude

duas.title: Dua for Parents Acceptance
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ارْضَ عَنْ وَالِدَيَّ كَمَا رَضِيتَ عَنْ أَنْبِيَائِكَ
duas.translation: O Allah, be pleased with my parents as You are pleased with Your prophets.
duas.benefits: Seeks highest pleasure for parents

duas.title: Dua for Parents Good Deeds
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ تَقَبَّلْ مِنْ وَالِدَيَّ صَالِحَ الْأَعْمَالِ
duas.translation: O Allah, accept the good deeds of my parents.
duas.benefits: Seeks acceptance of parents deeds

duas.title: Dua for Parents Guidance
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اهْدِ وَالِدَيَّ إِلَى صِرَاطِكَ الْمُسْتَقِيمِ
duas.translation: O Allah, guide my parents to Your straight path.
duas.benefits: Seeks guidance for parents

duas.title: Dua for Parents Health
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اشْفِ وَالِدَيَّ وَعَافِهِمَا وَأَذْهِبْ عَنْهُمَا الْبَأْسَ
duas.translation: O Allah, heal my parents and remove all harm from them.
duas.benefits: Seeks health for parents

duas.title: Dua for Obedience to Parents
duas.arabic: رَبِّ اجْعَلْنِي مِنَ الْبَارِّينَ بِوَالِدَيَّ
duas.translation: My Lord, make me among those who are dutiful to their parents.
duas.benefits: Seeks ability to honor parents

duas.title: Dua for Relief from Debt
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلَالِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ
duas.translation: O Allah, suffice me with lawful over unlawful and enrich me by Your bounty.
duas.benefits: The Prophet taught this for debt relief

duas.title: Dua for Distress Relief
duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
duas.translation: There is no god but You, glory be to You. I am among the wrongdoers.
duas.benefits: Relieves any distress including debt

duas.title: Dua for Debt Repayment
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ وَالْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ وَضَلَعِ الدَّيْنِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge from anxiety, sorrow, weakness, laziness, and debt burden.
duas.benefits: Comprehensive refuge including debt

duas.title: Dua for Sufficiency
duas.arabic: حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ
duas.translation: Allah is sufficient for me. There is no god but Him. I put my trust in Him.
duas.benefits: Suffices the one who says it 7 times

duas.title: Dua for Halal Provision
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ارْزُقْنِي رِزْقًا حَلَالًا طَيِّبًا
duas.translation: O Allah, grant me pure halal provision.
duas.benefits: Seeks halal income for debt repayment

duas.title: Dua for Ease in Repayment
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ يَسِّرْ لِي أَدَاءَ دَيْنِي وَأَعِنِّي عَلَى قَضَائِهِ
duas.translation: O Allah, make it easy to repay my debt and help me settle it.
duas.benefits: Seeks divine assistance in repayment

duas.title: Dua for Barakah in Little
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لِي فِيمَا رَزَقْتَنِي
duas.translation: O Allah, bless me in what You have provided me.
duas.benefits: Makes little suffice

duas.title: Dua for a Way Out
duas.arabic: وَمَن يَتَّقِ اللَّهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُ مَخْرَجًا وَيَرْزُقْهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَحْتَسِبُ
duas.translation: Whoever fears Allah, He will make a way out and provide from unexpected sources.
duas.benefits: Allah promises a way out for the righteous

duas.title: Dua for Contentment
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَضِّنِي بِمَا قَسَمْتَ لِي
duas.translation: O Allah, make me content with what You allotted.
duas.benefits: Fosters contentment

duas.title: Dua for Protection from Debt
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَفْوَ وَالْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for pardon and well-being in both worlds.
duas.benefits: Overall well-being including financial health

duas.title: Dua Before Sleeping
duas.arabic: بِاسْمِكَ اللَّهُمَّ أَمُوتُ وَأَحْيَا
duas.translation: In Your name, O Allah, I die and I live.
duas.benefits: The Prophet would say this before sleeping

duas.title: Dua When Waking Up
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah who gave us life after death, to Him is resurrection.
duas.benefits: The Prophet said this upon waking

duas.title: Dua for Protection During Sleep
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِعِزَّتِكَ وَجَلَالِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا أَجِدُ
duas.translation: In Allah name, I seek refuge in Your might from the evil I feel.
duas.benefits: Protection from nightmares and harm

duas.title: Dua for Good Dreams
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ رُؤْيَا صَالِحَةً صَادِقَةً
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for a righteous truthful dream.
duas.benefits: Seeks good dreams

duas.title: Dua for Relief from Nightmares
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ غَضَبِهِ وَعِقَابِهِ
duas.translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from His anger and punishment.
duas.benefits: Protection from nightmares and evil whispers

duas.title: Dua When Unable to Sleep
duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ الْوَاحِدُ الْقَهَّارُ رَبُّ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ
duas.translation: There is no god but Allah, the One, the Subduer, Lord of the heavens and earth.
duas.benefits: Helps induce sleep

duas.title: Dua for Sleeping Position
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِسْمِكَ وَضَعْتُ جَنْبِي وَبِسْمِكَ أَرْفَعُهُ
duas.translation: O Allah, in Your name I lay down and in Your name I rise.
duas.benefits: The Prophet would sleep on right side saying this

duas.title: Dua for Nightmares Protection
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ وَالنَّارِ وَفِتْنَةِ الْمَحْيَا وَالْمَمَاتِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge from punishment of grave, fire, and trials of life and death.
duas.benefits: Protection from spiritual harms

duas.title: Dua for Peaceful Sleep
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْزِلْ عَلَيْنَا سَكِينَةً وَأَمْنًا وَاجْعَلْ نَوْمَنَا مُبَارَكًا
duas.translation: O Allah, send tranquility and peace on us, make our sleep blessed.
duas.benefits: Seeks peaceful sleep

duas.title: Dua for Waking at Night
duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ
duas.translation: There is no god but Allah alone, no partner, His is the kingdom and all praise.
duas.benefits: Whoever wakes at night and says this, prayer is accepted

duas.title: Dua Entering the Mosque
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ افْتَحْ لِي أَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ
duas.translation: O Allah, open for me the doors of Your mercy.
duas.benefits: The Prophet taught this when entering mosque

duas.title: Dua Leaving the Mosque
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for Your bounty.
duas.benefits: The Prophet taught this when leaving mosque

duas.title: Dua for Acceptance of Worship
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا تَقَبَّلْ مِنَّا إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
duas.translation: Our Lord, accept from us. You are the All-Hearing, All-Knowing.
duas.benefits: Dua of Ibrahim (AS) for acceptance

duas.title: Dua Going to Mosque
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ فِي قَلْبِي نُورًا وَفِي لِسَانِي نُورًا
duas.translation: O Allah, place light in my heart and tongue.
duas.benefits: Seeks spiritual light

duas.title: Dua After Adhan
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ هَذِهِ الدَّعْوَةِ التَّامَّةِ وَالصَّلَاةِ الْقَائِمَةِ آتِ مُحَمَّدًا الْوَسِيلَةَ
duas.translation: O Allah, Lord of this perfect call, grant Muhammad the intercession.
duas.benefits: Whoever says this after Adhan gets Prophets intercession

duas.title: Dua for Istiqamah
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَعِنِّي عَلَى ذِكْرِكَ وَشُكْرِكَ وَحُسْنِ عِبَادَتِكَ
duas.translation: O Allah, help me to remember, thank, and worship You well.
duas.benefits: Comprehensive dua for worship

duas.title: Dua for Focus in Prayer
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْخُشُوعَ فِي الصَّلَاةِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for humility in prayer.
duas.benefits: Seeks focus in prayer

duas.title: Dua Between Prostrations
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَارْحَمْنِي وَاهْدِنِي وَعَافِنِي وَارْزُقْنِي
duas.translation: O Allah, forgive me, have mercy, guide me, grant well-being, and provide.
duas.benefits: Comprehensive dua during prayer

duas.title: Dua After Tashahhud
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ وَجَهَنَّمَ وَفِتْنَةِ الْمَحْيَا وَالْمَمَاتِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge from punishment of grave, Hell, and trials.
duas.benefits: The Prophet taught this before tasleem

duas.title: Dua for Night Prayer
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ أَنْتَ نُورُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ
duas.translation: O Allah, to You is all praise. You are the light of the heavens and earth.
duas.benefits: The Prophet said this when waking for night prayer

duas.title: Dua for Setting Out
duas.arabic: اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَذَا
duas.translation: Allah is Greatest. Glory be to Him who has subjected this to us.
duas.benefits: The Prophet said this when starting a journey

duas.title: Dua for Travel Protection
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْأَلُكَ فِي سَفَرِنَا هَذَا الْبِرَّ وَالتَّقْوَى وَمِنَ الْعَمَلِ مَا تَرْضَى
duas.translation: O Allah, we ask You for righteousness, piety, and deeds pleasing to You.
duas.benefits: Seeks divine guidance during travel

duas.title: Dua for Safe Return
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ هَوِّنْ عَلَيْنَا سَفَرَنَا وَاطْوِ عَنَّا بُعْدَهُ
duas.translation: O Allah, make this journey easy and fold its distance.
duas.benefits: Seeks ease and safety

duas.title: Dua Returning from Travel
duas.arabic: آيِبُونَ تَائِبُونَ عَابِدُونَ لِرَبِّنَا حَامِدُونَ
duas.translation: We return, repent, worship, and praise our Lord.
duas.benefits: The Prophet said this when returning from travel

duas.title: Dua Entering New Town
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِي مَدِينَتِنَا هَذِهِ وَارْزُقْنَا خَيْرَهَا
duas.translation: O Allah, bless us in this city and grant us its goodness.
duas.benefits: Seeks blessing in new places

duas.title: Dua for Travel Safety
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ احْفَظْنَا فِي سَفَرِنَا وَالْخُلْفَةَ فِي أَهْلِنَا
duas.translation: O Allah, protect us during travel and take care of our family.
duas.benefits: Protection for travelers and family

duas.title: Dua of Musa for Guidance
duas.arabic: عَسَى رَبِّي أَنْ يَهْدِيَنِي سَوَاءَ السَّبِيلِ
duas.translation: Perhaps my Lord will guide me to the right way.
duas.benefits: Musa (AS) said this traveling to Madyan

duas.title: Dua for Riding
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ
duas.translation: Glory to Him who subjected this to us, we could not have done it alone.
duas.benefits: Quranic dua for any transport

duas.title: Dua for Sea Travel
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ مَجْرَاهَا وَمُرْسَاهَا إِنَّ رَبِّي لَغَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
duas.translation: In Allah name is its sailing and anchorage. My Lord is Forgiving, Merciful.
duas.benefits: Dua of Nuh (AS) on the Ark

duas.title: Dua for New Moon
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَهِلَّهُ عَلَيْنَا بِالْأَمْنِ وَالْإِيمَانِ وَالسَّلَامَةِ وَالْإِسْلَامِ
duas.translation: O Allah, bring this moon to us with security, faith, safety, and Islam.
duas.benefits: Blessings for the new month

duas.title: Dua for Good in Both Worlds
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
duas.translation: Our Lord, give us good in this world, good in the Hereafter, save us from the Fire.
duas.benefits: Most comprehensive dua the Prophet frequently made

duas.title: Dua for Entering Paradise
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْجَنَّةَ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for Paradise and seek refuge from the Fire.
duas.benefits: Whoever asks for Jannah 3 times, Jannah asks Allah to admit them

duas.title: Dua for Al-Firdaus
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْفِرْدَوْسَ الْأَعْلَى مِنَ الْجَنَّةِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for Al-Firdaus, the highest Paradise.
duas.benefits: Al-Firdaus is the highest level of Jannah

duas.title: Dua for Protection from Fire
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَجِرْنِي مِنَ النَّارِ
duas.translation: O Allah, save me from the Fire.
duas.benefits: Whoever asks 3 times, the Fire asks Allah to protect them

duas.title: Dua for Good End
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اخْتِمْ لَنَا بِالسَّعَادَةِ وَأَدْخِلْنَا الْجَنَّةَ
duas.translation: O Allah, seal our lives with happiness and admit us to Paradise.
duas.benefits: Seeks good ending

duas.title: Dua for Easy Reckoning
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ حَاسِبْنِي حِسَابًا يَسِيرًا
duas.translation: O Allah, bring me to account with an easy account.
duas.benefits: Seeks easy judgment day

duas.title: Dua for Jannah with Loved Ones
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا وَأَدْخِلْهُمْ جَنَّاتِ عَدْنٍ الَّتِي وَعَدْتَهُمْ
duas.translation: Our Lord, admit them to Gardens of Eternity which You promised.
duas.benefits: Seeks Jannah for self and loved ones

duas.title: Dua for Accepted Deeds
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْمًا نَافِعًا وَرِزْقًا طَيِّبًا وَعَمَلًا مُتَقَبَّلًا
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask for beneficial knowledge, pure provision, accepted deeds.
duas.benefits: Success in both worlds

duas.title: Dua for Shade on Judgment Day
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَظِلَّنِي تَحْتَ عَرْشِكَ يَوْمَ لَا ظِلَّ إِلَّا ظِلُّكَ
duas.translation: O Allah, give me shade under Your Throne on the Day of no shade.
duas.benefits: Greatest honor on Judgment Day

duas.title: Dua for Good Ending
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ حُسْنَ الْخَاتِمَةِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for a good ending.
duas.benefits: Seeks to die in faith

duas.title: Dua Before Eating
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
duas.translation: In the name of Allah.
duas.benefits: The Prophet taught to say Bismillah before eating

duas.title: Dua After Eating
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنِي هَذَا وَرَزَقَنِيهِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah who fed me this without any power from me.
duas.benefits: Forgives past sins when said after meal

duas.title: Dua When Forgetting Bismillah
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ فِي أَوَّلِهِ وَآخِرِهِ
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, at its beginning and end.
duas.benefits: Covers forgetting to say Bismillah

duas.title: Dua for the Host
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَهُمْ فِيمَا رَزَقْتَهُمْ وَاغْفِرْ لَهُمْ وَارْحَمْهُمْ
duas.translation: O Allah, bless them in what You provided, forgive and have mercy.
duas.benefits: The Prophet said this for hosts

duas.title: Dua for Barakah in Food
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِيهِ وَأَطْعِمْنَا خَيْرًا مِنْهُ
duas.translation: O Allah, bless it for us and feed us with better.
duas.benefits: When food seems insufficient

duas.title: Dua After Drinking Milk
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِيهِ وَزِدْنَا مِنْهُ
duas.translation: O Allah, bless it for us and give us more.
duas.benefits: The Prophet said this after milk

duas.title: Dua for Iftar
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ صُمْتُ وَعَلَى رِزْقِكَ أَفْطَرْتُ
duas.translation: O Allah, for You I fasted, with Your provision I break my fast.
duas.benefits: Dua for breaking fast

duas.title: Dua for Reciprocal Blessing
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَطْعِمْ مَنْ أَطْعَمَنِي وَاسْقِ مَنْ سَقَانِي
duas.translation: O Allah, feed and give drink to those who fed and gave me drink.
duas.benefits: Dua of reciprocal blessing

duas.title: Dua When Eating with Others
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ طَعَامَنَا مُبَارَكًا
duas.translation: O Allah, make our food blessed.
duas.benefits: Seeks blessing for the meal

duas.title: Dua at Someones Home
duas.arabic: أَفْطَرَ عِنْدَكُمُ الصَّائِمُونَ وَأَكَلَ طَعَامَكُمُ الْأَبْرَارُ وَصَلَّتْ عَلَيْكُمُ الْمَلَائِكَةُ
duas.translation: May the fasting break fast with you, righteous eat your food, angels bless you.
duas.benefits: The Prophet taught this when hosted

duas.title: Dua When It Rains
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَيِّبًا نَافِعًا
duas.translation: O Allah, send beneficial rain.
duas.benefits: The Prophet said this when it rained

duas.title: Dua for Heavy Rain
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ حَوَالَيْنَا وَلَا عَلَيْنَا
duas.translation: O Allah, around us and not upon us.
duas.benefits: When rain becomes excessive

duas.title: Dua for Good Rain
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اسْقِنَا غَيْثًا مُغِيثًا مَرِيئًا نَافِعًا غَيْرَ ضَارٍّ
duas.translation: O Allah, send wholesome beneficial rain that does not harm.
duas.benefits: Seeks beneficial rain

duas.title: Dua When Wind Blows
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَهَا وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهَا
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for its good and seek refuge from its evil.
duas.benefits: The Prophet said this when wind blew

duas.title: Dua for Thunder and Lightning
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي يُسَبِّحُ الرَّعْدُ بِحَمْدِهِ وَالْمَلَائِكَةُ مِنْ خِيفَتِهِ
duas.translation: Glory to Him whom thunder glorifies and angels from fear of Him.
duas.benefits: Glorifies Allah during storms

duas.title: Dua After Rain
duas.arabic: مُطِرْنَا بِفَضْلِ اللَّهِ وَرَحْمَتِهِ
duas.translation: We have received rain by the grace and mercy of Allah.
duas.benefits: Gratitude for rain

duas.title: Dua When Seeing Clouds
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا فِيهَا
duas.translation: O Allah, we seek refuge from the evil within them.
duas.benefits: Protection from harmful weather

duas.title: Dua During Storm
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَا تَقْتُلْنَا بِغَضَبِكَ وَلَا تُهْلِكْنَا بِعَذَابِكَ
duas.translation: O Allah, do not kill us with Your anger or destroy us with punishment.
duas.benefits: Protection during severe weather

duas.title: Dua for Heat Relief
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَجِرْنِي مِنْ حَرِّ جَهَنَّمَ
duas.translation: O Allah, save me from the heat of Hellfire.
duas.benefits: Relief from heat and protection from Hellfire

duas.title: Dua When Seeing Moon
duas.arabic: اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ اللَّهُمَّ أَهِلَّهُ عَلَيْنَا بِالْأَمْنِ وَالْإِيمَانِ
duas.translation: Allah is Greatest. O Allah, bring the moon with security and faith.
duas.benefits: Blessings with the new moon

duas.title: Dua of Istikhara
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْتَخِيرُكَ بِعِلْمِكَ وَأَسْتَقْدِرُكَ بِقُدْرَتِكَ وَأَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ الْعَظِيمِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek guidance by Your knowledge and strength by Your power.
duas.benefits: Complete guidance for all matters

duas.title: Dua for Right Decision
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَلْهِمْنِي رُشْدِي وَأَعِذْنِي مِنْ شَرِّ نَفْسِي
duas.translation: O Allah, inspire me with right guidance, protect me from my self.
duas.benefits: Seeks divine inspiration

duas.title: Dua for Trusting Outcome
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَيْكَ وَسَلَّمْتُ أَمْرِي إِلَيْكَ
duas.translation: O Allah, I trust You and submit my matter to You.
duas.benefits: Complete reliance on Allah

duas.title: Dua for Best Outcome
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنْ كَانَ هَذَا الْأَمْرُ خَيْرًا لِي فِي دِينِي وَمَعَاشِي وَعَاقِبَةِ أَمْرِي فَاقْدُرْهُ لِي
duas.translation: O Allah, if this matter is good for my faith and livelihood, decree it for me.
duas.benefits: Seeks what is truly good

duas.title: Dua for Contentment with Decree
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَضِّنِي بِقَضَائِكَ وَبَارِكْ لِي فِيمَا قُدِّرَ لِي
duas.translation: O Allah, make me content with Your decree and bless what is destined.
duas.benefits: Peace with Allah decree

duas.title: Dua for Clarity
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَرِنَا الْحَقَّ حَقًّا وَارْزُقْنَا اتِّبَاعَهُ
duas.translation: O Allah, show us truth as truth and grant us to follow it.
duas.benefits: Clarity between right and wrong

duas.title: Dua for Removing Confusion
duas.arabic: رَبِّ أَعِنِّي وَلَا تُعِنْ عَلَيَّ وَانْصُرْنِي وَلَا تَنْصُرْ عَلَيَّ
duas.translation: My Lord, help me, do not help against me. Grant me victory.
duas.benefits: Seeks divine help

duas.title: Dua for Barakah in Choice
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لِي فِيمَا اخْتَرْتُهُ وَارْضِنِي بِهِ
duas.translation: O Allah, bless me in what I chose and make me content with it.
duas.benefits: Blessing in the chosen option

duas.title: Dua of Ibrahim for Wisdom
duas.arabic: رَبِّ هَبْ لِي حُكْمًا وَأَلْحِقْنِي بِالصَّالِحِينَ
duas.translation: My Lord, grant me wisdom and join me with the righteous.
duas.benefits: Dua of Ibrahim (AS) for wisdom

duas.title: Dua for Opening Doors
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ افْتَحْ لَنَا مِنْ أَبْوَابِ الْخَيْرِ وَالْبَرَكَةِ
duas.translation: O Allah, open for us the doors of goodness and blessing.
duas.benefits: Seeks opportunities and blessings

duas.title: Alhamdulillah
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah, the Lord of the worlds.
duas.benefits: Most fundamental praise in Quran

duas.title: Dua of Sulayman (AS)
duas.arabic: رَبِّ أَوْزِعْنِي أَنْ أَشْكُرَ نِعْمَتَكَ الَّتِي أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيَّ
duas.translation: My Lord, inspire me to be grateful for Your favor on me.
duas.benefits: Dua for gratitude and righteous deeds

duas.title: Dua for Increase
duas.arabic: لَئِنْ شَكَرْتُمْ لَأَزِيدَنَّكُمْ
duas.translation: If you are grateful, I will surely increase you.
duas.benefits: Allah promises increase through gratitude

duas.title: Dua for Help with Gratitude
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَعِنِّي عَلَى شُكْرِكَ وَذِكْرِكَ وَحُسْنِ عِبَادَتِكَ
duas.translation: O Allah, help me to thank, remember, and worship You well.
duas.benefits: The Prophet taught this comprehensive dua

duas.title: Morning Gratitude
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah who gave us life after death.
duas.benefits: Gratitude for waking up alive

duas.title: Dua for New Blessing
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي بِنِعْمَتِهِ تَتِمُّ الصَّالِحَاتُ
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah by whose favor good deeds are completed.
duas.benefits: Gratitude for completed deeds

duas.title: Dua of Nuh (AS)
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي نَجَّانَا مِنَ الْقَوْمِ الظَّالِمِينَ
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah who saved us from wrongdoers.
duas.benefits: Gratitude for being saved

duas.title: Dua for Pleasant Things
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ عَلَى كُلِّ نِعْمَةٍ أَنْعَمْتَ بِهَا عَلَيْنَا
duas.translation: O Allah, to You is all praise for every blessing.
duas.benefits: Acknowledges Allah as source of blessings

duas.title: Dua for Gratitude in Hardship
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ عَلَى كُلِّ حَالٍ
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah in every situation.
duas.benefits: Gratitude even in difficulty

duas.title: Dua of Paradise People
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي صَدَقَنَا وَعْدَهُ وَأَوْرَثَنَا الْأَرْضَ
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah who fulfilled His promise and made us inherit the land.
duas.benefits: Gratitude of Jannah people

duas.title: Dua Entering Gathering
duas.arabic: السَّلَامُ عَلَيْكُمْ وَرَحْمَةُ اللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ
duas.translation: Peace be upon you, mercy of Allah and His blessings.
duas.benefits: Islamic greeting brings peace

duas.title: Dua Leaving Gathering
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ وَبِحَمْدِكَ أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ أَسْتَغْفِرُكَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْكَ
duas.translation: Glory to You O Allah, I bear witness there is no god but You, I seek forgiveness.
duas.benefits: Forgives sins committed in gathering

duas.title: Dua When Yawning
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ
duas.translation: I seek refuge in Allah from the accursed Shaitan.
duas.benefits: Protection when yawning

duas.title: Dua for Spiritual Protection
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اقْسِمْ لَنَا مِنْ خَشْيَتِكَ مَا يَحُولُ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَ مَعَاصِيكَ
duas.translation: O Allah, grant us fear of You that prevents sin.
duas.benefits: Spiritual protection in gatherings

duas.title: Dua for Blessed Gathering
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَهُمْ فِي اجْتِمَاعِهِمْ وَاحْفَظْهُمْ
duas.translation: O Allah, bless their gathering and protect them.
duas.benefits: Seeking blessing for gathering

duas.title: Dua When Sneezing
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah.
duas.benefits: Sunnah when sneezing

duas.title: Response to Sneezer
duas.arabic: يَرْحَمُكَ اللَّهُ
duas.translation: May Allah have mercy on you.
duas.benefits: Response to sneezer who says Alhamdulillah

duas.title: Dua Starting a Speech
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ نَحْمَدُهُ وَنَسْتَعِينُهُ وَنَسْتَغْفِرُهُ
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah, we praise, seek help, and ask forgiveness.
duas.benefits: The Prophet began speeches with praise

duas.title: Dua Seeing Afflicted
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي عَافَانِي مِمَّا ابْتَلَاكَ بِهِ
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah who saved me from what afflicted you.
duas.benefits: Gratitude for safety

duas.title: Dua for Reconciliation
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَصْلِحْ بَيْنَ الْإِخْوَةِ وَأَلِّفْ بَيْنَ الْقُلُوبِ
duas.translation: O Allah, reconcile between brothers and unite their hearts.
duas.benefits: Seeks harmony and unity

duas.title: Dua When Wearing New Clothes
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي كَسَانِي هَذَا وَرَزَقَنِيهِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلَا قُوَّةٍ
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah who clothed me with this without my power.
duas.benefits: Gratitude for new clothes

duas.title: Dua for Dresser
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ أَنْتَ كَسَوْتَنِيهِ أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَهُ وَخَيْرَ مَا صُنِعَ لَهُ
duas.translation: O Allah, to You is praise, You clothed me. I ask for its goodness.
duas.benefits: Seeks goodness from what one wears

duas.title: Dua for Beautiful Appearance
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ حَسِّنْ خَلْقِي وَخُلُقِي
duas.translation: O Allah, beautify my appearance and character.
duas.benefits: Seeks both inner and outer beauty

duas.title: Dua When Looking in Mirror
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ حَسَّنْتَ خَلْقِي فَحَسِّنْ خُلُقِي
duas.translation: O Allah, You made my form beautiful, so beautify my character.
duas.benefits: Reminds that character matters more than looks

duas.title: Dua for Modesty
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اسْتُرْ عَوْرَاتِي وَآمِنْ رَوْعَاتِي
duas.translation: O Allah, cover my faults and calm my fears.
duas.benefits: Seeks modesty and protection

duas.title: Dua for Taking Off Clothes
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
duas.translation: In the name of Allah.
duas.benefits: Seeking Allah name when undressing

duas.title: Dua for Entering Bathroom
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْخُبُثِ وَالْخَبَائِثِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from male and female devils.
duas.benefits: Protection when entering restroom

duas.title: Dua for Leaving Bathroom
duas.arabic: غُفْرَانَكَ
duas.translation: Your forgiveness, O Allah.
duas.benefits: The Prophet said this when leaving

duas.title: Dua for Giving Clothes to Others
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَهُ فِي مَا لَبِسَ وَاجْعَلْهُ مِنْ أَهْلِ التَّقْوَى
duas.translation: O Allah, bless him in what he wears and make him among the pious.
duas.benefits: Dua for someone you give clothes to

duas.title: Dua for New Garment
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ خَيْرِهِ وَخَيْرِ مَا هُوَ لَهُ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهِ وَشَرِّ مَا هُوَ لَهُ
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for its goodness and the good it is for.
duas.benefits: Comprehensive dua for new clothing

duas.title: Dua for Visiting the Sick
duas.arabic: لَا بَأْسَ طَهُورٌ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ
duas.translation: No worry, it will be a purification, Allah willing.
duas.benefits: The Prophet said this when visiting the sick

duas.title: Dua for Shifa (Healing)
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ النَّاسِ أَذْهِبِ الْبَاسَ وَاشْفِهِ وَأَنْتَ الشَّافِي
duas.translation: O Allah, Lord of mankind, remove the harm and heal, You are the Healer.
duas.benefits: Powerful healing dua by the Prophet
duas.timing: When sick or for sick person

duas.title: Dua of Ayyub (AS)
duas.arabic: رَبِّ إِنِّي مَسَّنِيَ الضُّرُّ وَأَنْتَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
duas.translation: My Lord, adversity has touched me, and You are the Most Merciful.
duas.benefits: Allah restored Ayyub health

duas.title: Dua for Protection from Diseases
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْبَرَصِ وَالْجُنُونِ وَالْجُذَامِ
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge from leprosy, madness, and leprosy.
duas.benefits: Protection from serious diseases

duas.title: Dua for Expiation of Sickness
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْهُ كَفَّارَةً لِذُنُوبِي
duas.translation: O Allah, make this sickness an expiation for my sins.
duas.benefits: Turns sickness into reward

duas.title: Dua for Patience in Illness
duas.arabic: إِنَّا لِلَّهِ وَإِنَّا إِلَيْهِ رَاجِعُونَ اللَّهُمَّ أْجُرْنِي فِي مُصِيبَتِي
duas.translation: We belong to Allah and to Him we return. Reward me in my affliction.
duas.benefits: Patience and reward in illness

duas.title: Dua for Strength in Illness
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اشْفِنِي شِفَاءً لَا يُغَادِرُ سَقَمًا
duas.translation: O Allah, heal me with a healing that leaves no ailment.
duas.benefits: Complete healing

duas.title: Dua for Visiting the Sick 2
duas.arabic: أَسْأَلُ اللَّهَ الْعَظِيمَ رَبَّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ أَنْ يَشْفِيَكَ
duas.translation: I ask Allah, the Mighty, Lord of the Mighty Throne, to heal you.
duas.benefits: Whoever says this 7 times, the sick person recovers

duas.title: Dua for Fever
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الْكَبِيرِ نَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ الْعَظِيمِ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ عِرْقٍ يَّعْرُ
duas.translation: In the name of Allah the Great, we seek refuge in Allah from fever.
duas.benefits: Protection from fever harm

duas.title: Dua for Recovery Gratitude
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي عَافَانِي فِي جَسَدِي وَرَدَّ عَلَيَّ رُوحِي
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah who healed my body and returned my soul.
duas.benefits: Gratitude for recovery and health
